themes.reasoning_notes: Exiles a target graveyard card at instant speed; narrow but real graveyard interaction that answers recursion targets.
Creates a 1/1 Spirit token as added value, but token production is incidental rather than the main deckbuilding pull.
The created Spirit has flying, giving minor evasive synergy for decks that care about fliers.
Instantly exiles a target card from a graveyard; this is direct graveyard interaction, not spot removal in normal removal taxonomy.
Also makes a 1/1 Spirit token with flying, but the token is rider value rather than the main deckbuilding reason to play it.
